---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, spec addition, or framework mapping.
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Concrete examples beat abstract goals (Dukkha — name the problem first).

## Proposed solution

How would you address it? Reference existing spec docs where relevant ([`PHILOSOPHY.en.md`](../../modules/agent-template/docs/en/PHILOSOPHY.en.md), [`ARCHITECTURE.en.md`](../../docs/en/ARCHITECTURE.en.md), [`ROADMAP.en.md`](../../docs/en/ROADMAP.en.md)).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one wins.

## Scope

- **Surface affected:** (framework spec / agent template / CLI / runtime / hooks / skills)
- **Phase:** (Phase 1 v2.0 / Phase 2 / Phase 3 / Phase 4 — see ROADMAP)
- **Backwards compatibility:** (additive only / breaking change to spec / breaking change to CLI / unclear)

## Buddhist framework alignment

Which BWOC principle motivates this? (Yoniso manasikāra · Mattaññutā · Anattā · Samānattatā · Sīlasāmaññatā · or any of the 22 in [`GLOSSARY.en.md`](../../docs/en/GLOSSARY.en.md)). Optional but encouraged — it helps reviewers situate the proposal.

## Additional context

Prior art, related discussions, sketches.
